component.name: AS Adventurer
component.summary: Real-time GIFtuber / expression overlay for OBS

description.p: AS Adventurer is a real-time streaming overlay that switches character animations based on facial tracking and voice detection. Designed for OBS Studio browser sources.
Features include multi-model support, nested emotes, VTube Studio and iFacialMocap UDP tracking, webcam (MediaPipe) tracking, and microphone speaking/typing detection.
Initial Linux Flatpak release (Node port of the Windows client).
